title: ilex zeylanica
intro: Ilex zeylanica, also known as the Indian holly or Nilgiri holly, is a plant species belonging to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae) native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ilex zeylanica include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, manage diabetes, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
